assertion_results.text: Output states only the aggregate root can emit domain events
assertion_results.evidence: Output states 'only the aggregate root should emit domain events'

assertion_results.text: Output identifies User as the aggregate root and sole event emitter
assertion_results.evidence: Output identifies 'the aggregate root (User), which then raises the appropriate event'

assertion_results.text: Output does NOT suggest any workaround that lets Person emit events
assertion_results.evidence: Workaround described ('Person should signal the change to the aggregate root') does not let Person emit events — User emits; Person remains a passive signaler only
